title: Jacob Jones and the Bigfoot Mystery
extract: Jacob Jones and the Bigfoot Mystery is an episodic adventure video game developed by Lucid Games. Part 1 was originally published by Sony Computer Entertainment on PlayStation Vita on May 14, 2013, and later on iOS on May 16, 2013. Episode 2 was released on iOS on July 24, 2014. Both episodes have since been removed from all app stores and made available for Windows via Steam.
